reasoning: This video appears to be an instructional demonstration about laparoscopic suturing techniques rather than an actual FLS task performance. The frames show educational content with titles like 'Suturing in Parallel and Perpendicular Planes', 'Motion of Object', 'Geometric Shapes', 'Systematic Approach', 'Loop Preparation', and various technical illustrations. No actual timed performance of the intracorporeal suturing task is visible. Without a clear start time, completion time, or observable task execution, this cannot be scored as an FLS performance.
